pi_items.source: Verified against task description instructions and verifier.py logic which strictly checks these specific category linkages.
Verified against setup_task.sh which synthetically creates these three products, and verifier.py which explicitly requires them to be linked to their respective new categories.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected product records created via SQL in the setup script. Both the required 3-level category hierarchy (e.g., 'Smart Home Technologies' -> 'Security' -> 'Cameras') and the target assignments for the 3 uncategorized products ('WiFi Doorbell Camera 4K', 'Motion Sensor Pro', 'Smart Hub Controller') were verified to match the exact requirements tested by the verifier script.
